text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oookay! I'm gonna get so much sleep tonight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(All right, sheep. On your marks, get set... go!
One sheep! Two sheep! Three sheep!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(...100 sheep! 101 sheep! 102 sheep! I'm not
done yet!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(...10,000 sheep! 10,001 sheep! 10,002 sheep!
This is great! I could do this all night!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why's it so bright out? I-is it morning
already?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Y-y-yikes! Looks like I counted those sheep a little too well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Completely contrary to her intentions,
Matikanetannhauser stays up all night.
